pageDescriptionBefore: With a $10,000 initial investment and $200 monthly at 8% return, your portfolio could grow to
pageDescriptionAfter: Use our calculator for exact projections based on your inputs.
labelInflationHint: Optional — shows value in today's purchasing power
hintCompounding: Match this to how your account or fund actually credits interest.
importantBody: This calculator provides estimated investment growth for planning only. Actual returns vary with market conditions, fees, and taxes. Past performance does not guarantee future results. Consult a licensed financial advisor for personalized advice.
resultsSubtitle: Future value, interest earned, and portfolio estimate
emptyHint: Enter your investment details and click “Calculate future value” to see projected growth here.
proTip1: Start early — compound interest has the biggest impact over long time horizons.
proTip2: Match compounding frequency to how your account actually credits interest.
proTip3: Use inflation adjustment to see real purchasing power, not just nominal dollars.
proTip4: Regular monthly contributions often matter more than chasing a slightly higher return rate.
proTip5: Review assumptions periodically; past returns do not guarantee future performance.
errInitial: Enter a valid initial investment (0 or greater).
errRate: Enter a valid annual interest rate (0% or greater).
errYears: Enter a valid time period greater than 0 years.
